message: Prefix section headings with type emoji

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+---
+title: Show type emoji in exported headings
+type: change
+created: 2025-10-23
+---
+
+Prefixed type section headers in Markdown and JSON exports with their emoji
+while keeping entry titles plain, and added a `--no-emoji` opt-out flag.

@@ -60,6 +60,17 @@
 }
 
 
+def _format_section_title(entry_type: str, include_emoji: bool) -> str:
+    """Return the section title with an optional type emoji prefix."""
+    section_title = TYPE_SECTION_TITLES.get(entry_type, entry_type.title())
+    if not include_emoji:
+        return section_title
+    emoji = ENTRY_TYPE_EMOJIS.get(entry_type)
+    if not emoji:
+        return section_title
+    return f"{emoji} {section_title}"
+
+

     summary: str,
     command_name: str,
